popularStory.headline: Life Sketch
popularStory.description: Henry Clifford, 10th Baron de Clifford, also 10th feudal baron of Skipton (ca. 1454 – 23 April 1523)[1] was a member of the Clifford family which was seared at Skipton Castle from 1310 to 1676. He was …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Clifford於大約1455年出生在英國越可爾斯吉普頓時，他的父親Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford21歲，母親Margaret Bromflete21歲。他於大約1511年與Anne St John在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他於1523年在英國維斯特莫藍德被列為the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland。他去世於1523年4月23日在英國維斯特莫藍德沙普享年69歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德沙普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Clifford于大约1455年出生在英国越可爾斯吉普頓时，他的父亲Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford21岁，母亲Margaret Bromflete21岁。他于大约1511年与Anne St John在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1513年登记服兵役。他于1523年在英国維斯特莫藍德被列为the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland。他去世于1523年4月23日在英国維斯特莫藍德沙普享年69岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德沙普。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Clifford was born about 1455, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Bromflete, was 21. He married Anne St John about 1511, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1513. In 1523, his occupation is listed as the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England. He died on 23 April 1523, in Shap, Westmorland, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Shap, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Clifford est né environ 1455, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bromflete, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne St John environ 1511, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. En 1523, sa profession de son indiquée est the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland à Westmorland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1523, à Shap, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Shap, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Clifford um 1455 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Bromflete 21. Er hat um 1511 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Anne St John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1523 ist sein Beruf als the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. April 1523 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Shap, Westmorland, England und wurde in Shap, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Clifford è nato il circa 1455 nel Skipton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bromflete, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anne St John circa 1511, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Nel 1523, la sua occupazione è indicata come the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland nel Westmorland, England. Morì il 23 aprile 1523, nel Shap, Westmorland, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Shap, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Cliffordが約1455年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Cliffordは21歳，母Margaret Bromfleteは21歳であった。約1511年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAnne St Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。1523年，イギリスウエストモーランドでの職業はthe hereditary office of sheriff of westmorlandと記録されている。彼は1523年4月23日にイギリスウエストモーランドシャップで69歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドシャップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Clifford(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bromflete(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Anne St John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1523년, 그의 직업은 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland이었다. 그는 1523년 4월 23일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 샤프에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 샤프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bromflete, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne St John aproximadamente 1511, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Em 1523, sua profissão aparece como the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1523, em Shap, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Shap, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Clifford родился около 1455 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bromflete, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne St John около 1511 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1523 годуработал по профессии the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland в местности вестморланд, Англия. Он умер 23 апреля 1523 г. в местности шап, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности шап, вестморланд, Англия.

sm.from 1523 to 1542: mai le 1523 e o'o I le 1542

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Clifford nació aproximadamente 1455, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Clifford 9th Baron Clifford, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Bromflete, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne St John aproximadamente 1511, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. En 1523, su ocupación registrada era the hereditary office of sheriff of westmorland en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Murió el 23 de abril de 1523, en Shap, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Shap, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
